name: David Berger
description: American arranger, composer, conductor, and trumpeter

about_quotes.speaker: Sudhalter
about_quotes.evidence: I would guess that David Berger’s situation tonight might be the same... I think he teaches at a major Manhattan school or something.

about_quotes.speaker: Jean Bach
about_quotes.evidence: I still hadn’t seen the thing. And I got a little panicked and I enlisted a fellow called David Berger.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jean Bach interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 18, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Milt Fillius
about_quotes.evidence: Dave Berger called me... and he said I have an idea I want to do Milt’s life
about_quotes.doc_title: Milt Fillius interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 18, 2000
